active.consequence: Squeeks may spread word of the party's heroism to other dungeon NPCs
Nightstalker hunting party may track the party's scent to the village
active.trigger: If party stays in village for more than 2 days, or leaves at night again

active.consequence: Sheol Glass Reaper Case inside Tandy's stomach - unstable WMD absorbing magic pulses internally. Unknown side effects.
active.trigger: Ongoing - each magic pulse, and when party reaches Floor 4

resolved.consequence: Deadline: 18 hours to reach Floor 2 stairs or face termination
Mongo's crew may become allies or rivals depending on how negotiations go
resolved.trigger: When party leaves safe room or makes demands

resolved.consequence: Imani's alliance decision pending - will become allies or go separate ways
resolved.trigger: When party responds to alliance offer

resolved.consequence: Brennan needs extended rest or healing - cannot travel quickly
resolved.trigger: When party tries to move fast or enter combat

resolved.consequence: Brennan needs rest or healing before he can travel on his own
resolved.trigger: When party needs to move quickly or enter combat

resolved.consequence: The 5 surviving crawlers from Hive Mother fight may seek to join Tandy's crew permanently or go their own way
resolved.trigger: When party discusses next steps at the inn

resolved.consequence: Circus creatures may be on high alert
Prometheus may attract attention from other factions
resolved.trigger: When party travels openly with dragon

resolved.consequence: The Mating Dance of Doom goes viral with viewers
Grimaldi will resurrect and seek revenge
Swordsmen below warehouse stirring - stealth check failed on roof landing. May fully activate if party makes more noise.
resolved.trigger: Next visit to warehouse or loud action in upper floor

resolved.consequence: Swordsmen army deactivated across the warehouse district. Power source destroyed.

pending.consequence: Mongo may go into uncontrollable frenzy if enemies appear suddenly
Mongo's bond with Donut grows stronger through combat victories
